---
title: "OSM for sustainable transport planning"
description: "Greta Timaite, James Hulse, and Robin Lovelace (2022). OSM for sustainable transport planning. *Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022*. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7004509"
date: "2022-08-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "timaite_osm_2022"
citation-type: "paper-conference"
citation-type-label: "Conference Paper"
venue: "Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.7004509"
publication-url: "https://zenodo.org/record/7004509"
authors:
  - "Greta Timaite"
  - "James Hulse"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "Timaite, G., Hulse, J., & Lovelace, R. (2022). OSM for sustainable transport planning. In: Minghini, M., Liu, P., Li, H., Grinberger, A.Y., & Juhász, L. (Eds.). Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022, Florence, Italy, 19-21 August 2022. Available at https://zenodo.org/communities/sotm-22"
---

**Type:** Conference Paper
**Venue:** Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022
**Year:** 2022

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7004509) [Publisher Link](https://zenodo.org/record/7004509) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

Timaite, G., Hulse, J., & Lovelace, R. (2022). OSM for sustainable transport planning. In: Minghini, M., Liu, P., Li, H., Grinberger, A.Y., & Juhász, L. (Eds.). Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022, Florence, Italy, 19-21 August 2022. Available at https://zenodo.org/communities/sotm-22

## Citation

Greta Timaite, James Hulse, and Robin Lovelace (2022). OSM for sustainable transport planning. *Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022*. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7004509

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@inproceedings{timaite_osm_2022,
	address = {Florence, Italy},
	title = {{OSM} for sustainable transport planning},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {https://zenodo.org/record/7004509},
	doi = {10.5281/zenodo.7004509},
	abstract = {Timaite, G., Hulse, J., \& Lovelace, R. (2022). OSM for sustainable transport planning. In: Minghini, M., Liu, P., Li, H., Grinberger, A.Y., \& Juhász, L. (Eds.). Proceedings of the Academic Track at State of the Map 2022, Florence, Italy, 19-21 August 2022. Available at https://zenodo.org/communities/sotm-22},
	language = {eng},
	urldate = {2022-09-20},
	booktitle = {roceedings of the {Academic} {Track} at {State} of the {Map} 2022},
	publisher = {Zenodo},
	author = {Timaite, Greta and Hulse, James and Lovelace, Robin},
	month = aug,
	year = {2022},
	doi = {10.5281/zenodo.7004509},
	note = {Conference Name: State of the Map 2022 (SotM 2022)},
	keywords = {geographic information science, giscience, openstreetmap, research, transport},
	pages = {30--33},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
